Vitus plans to visit again next Thursday: Vitus plans to visit again next Thursday. I shall set things up as planned. Regards, Cyrela."

The stage is set, I suppose. This may be: The stage is set, I suppose. This may be the last time you hear from me.
Again, regardless of manipulation or wha: Again, regardless of manipulation or what have you, it was a divine pleasure to be your disciple.
If I could do it again, I would.
